### About Me

Principal Solution Engineer at Salesforce with a background in digital commerce, marketing technology, and software development. I have 12+ years of experience designing solutions, shaping digital products, and connecting technology with business goals. I enjoy building communities around innovation, commerce, and emerging technologies.

- ☁️ Trailblazer: [lucianodiaz](https://www.salesforce.com/trailblazer/lucianodiaz)

---
